target.title: Rate limit node pairing requests [AI]
target.body:
## Summary

- Adds a gateway auth-rate-limit scope for node-role pairing requests created during WebSocket connect.
- Runs first-time node pairing requests through the existing serialized per-IP limiter before they enter the node-pairing storage lock.
- Returns the existing structured rate-limit connect error when a first-time node pairing bucket is exhausted.
- Preserves already paired node reconnects on their approved effective surface when only the fresh upgrade pairing request is throttled.
- Adds regression coverage for concurrent first-time node connects and paired-node upgrade reconnects under an exhausted bucket.

AI-assisted: yes.

## Linked context

No public issue is linked in this PR body.

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)

- Behavior or issue addressed: repeated first-time node connection attempts are throttled before they can queue node-pairing storage writes, while paired upgrade reconnects keep their approved surface.
- Real environment tested: local source checkout with the gateway WebSocket integration test harness, plus GitHub Actions PR CI pending on the latest head.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm format -- src/gateway/node-connect-reconcile.ts src/gateway/node-connect-reconcile.test.ts src/gateway/server/ws-connection/message-handler.ts src/gateway/server.node-pairing-rate-limit.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/node-connect-reconcile.test.ts src/gateway/server.node-pairing-rate-limit.test.ts src/gateway/server.preauth-bootstrap-token-rate-limit.test.ts src/gateway/auth-rate-limit.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/gateway/auth-rate-limit.ts src/gateway/node-connect-reconcile.ts src/gateway/node-connect-reconcile.test.ts src/gateway/server/ws-connection/message-handler.ts src/gateway/server.node-pairing-rate-limit.test.ts`; `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`.
- Evidence after fix: focused Vitest shard passed 12 files / 136 tests; review-pr wrapper tests passed on the same targeted files; autoreview passed clean on the current branch.
- Observed result after fix: with `maxAttempts: 3`, eight concurrent first-time node connects create three pending node-pairing requests and return five structured auth rate-limit responses; a paired node reconnecting with an upgraded capability declaration remains connected and does not create an extra pending request while the bucket is exhausted.
- What was not tested: external live non-loopback device traffic outside the local gateway test harness.
- Proof limitations or environment constraints: no external device or remote network environment was used; the gateway WebSocket harness exercises the real connect path in-process.
- Before evidence: the affected connect path called `requestNodePairing` directly without a node-pairing rate-limit scope.

## Tests and validation

Commands run:

- `pnpm format -- src/gateway/auth-rate-limit.ts src/gateway/server/ws-connection/message-handler.ts src/gateway/server.node-pairing-rate-limit.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server.node-pairing-rate-limit.test.ts src/gateway/server.preauth-bootstrap-token-rate-limit.test.ts src/gateway/auth-rate-limit.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/gateway/auth-rate-limit.ts src/gateway/server/ws-connection/message-handler.ts src/gateway/server.node-pairing-rate-limit.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm format -- src/gateway/node-connect-reconcile.ts src/gateway/node-connect-reconcile.test.ts src/gateway/server/ws-connection/message-handler.ts src/gateway/server.node-pairing-rate-limit.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/node-connect-reconcile.test.ts src/gateway/server.node-pairing-rate-limit.test.ts src/gateway/server.preauth-bootstrap-token-rate-limit.test.ts src/gateway/auth-rate-limit.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/gateway/auth-rate-limit.ts src/gateway/node-connect-reconcile.ts src/gateway/node-connect-reconcile.test.ts src/gateway/server/ws-connection/message-handler.ts src/gateway/server.node-pairing-rate-limit.test.ts`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`
- `scripts/pr review-tests 90147 src/gateway/node-connect-reconcile.test.ts src/gateway/server.node-pairing-rate-limit.test.ts src/gateway/server.preauth-bootstrap-token-rate-limit.test.ts src/gateway/auth-rate-limit.test.ts`
- `timeout 1800 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

Regression coverage added: `src/gateway/server.node-pairing-rate-limit.test.ts` covers concurrent first-time node-pairing attempts and paired reconnect upgrades through the real WebSocket connect path; `src/gateway/node-connect-reconcile.test.ts` covers preserving the approved effective surface when a paired upgrade request is throttled.

What failed before this fix: the node connect path had no node-pairing limiter before `requestNodePairing` entered the shared storage lock.

## Risk checklist

Did user-visible behavior change? (`Yes/No`)

Yes. Repeated first-time node pairing attempts from the same rate-limit identity can now receive the existing structured rate-limit connect error when the configured bucket is exhausted. Paired reconnects keep their approved surface when only the fresh upgrade request is throttled.

Did config, environment, or migration behavior change? (`Yes/No`)

No. This reuses the existing gateway auth rate-limit configuration and defaults.

Did security, auth, secrets, network, or tool execution behavior change? (`Yes/No`)

Yes. This changes the gateway security/auth boundary for node-role pairing requests by adding per-IP throttling before node-pairing storage writes.

What is the highest-risk area?

Unusually low `gateway.auth.rateLimit` settings can throttle rapid first-time node onboarding from the same rate-limit identity.

How is that risk mitigated?

The bucket uses the existing gateway rate-limit configuration, loopback exemption behavior, browser-origin limiter selection, and serialized attempt helper already used by auth-sensitive connect paths. Existing paired reconnects keep their approved surface if an upgrade pairing request is throttled.

## Current review state

What is the next action?

Wait for GitHub Actions CI and fresh bot review on the latest head.

What is still waiting on author, maintainer, CI, or external proof?

GitHub Actions CI is pending on the latest pushed head; external live non-loopback proof was not run.

Which bot or reviewer comments were addressed?

Addressed ClawSweeper feedback to preserve paired reconnects on their approved surface when node-pairing request throttling trips.
target.author: pgondhi987
